name: Link-Asia International MedTech Group Limited
summary: Link-Asia International MedTech Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides electronics manufacturing services for telecommunications, security, car electronics, home appliances, other consumer, and industrial electronic products. The company operates through four segments: Electronic Manufacturing Services, Distribution of Communications Products, Securities and Other Assets Investment, and Real Estate Supply Chain Services. It is also involved in the trading of personal care products, business telephone systems, and telecommunication products; manufacture and sale of telecommunications and other products, and consumable electronic products; sale of audio equipment; and provision of consultancy services. In addition, the company offers equity investment and property agency services; and real estate advisory and purchase services. It operates in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Switzerland, France, Poland, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Link-Asia International Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Link-Asia International MedTech Group Limited in December 2020. Link-Asia International MedTech Group Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
